시편 87:1.content: His foundation is in the holy mountains.

시편 87:2.content: Yahweh loves the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.

시편 87:3.content: Glorious things are spoken about you, city of God.

시편 87:4.content: I will record Rahab and Babylon among those who acknowledge me. Behold, Philistia, Tyre, and also Ethiopia: “This one was born there.”

시편 87:5.content: Yes, of Zion it will be said, “This one and that one was born in her;” the Most High himself will establish her.

시편 87:6.content: Yahweh will count, when he writes up the peoples, “This one was born there.”

시편 87:7.content: Those who sing as well as those who dance say, “All my springs are in you.”
